title: sempervivum tectorum subsp. alpinum
intro: Sempervivum tectorum subsp. alpinum, commonly known as the houseleek or living stonecrop, is a type of succulent plant belonging to the succulent family, Crassulaceae. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sempervivum tectorum subsp. alpinum include wound healing, protection against radiation damage, and potential antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are used to treat various health conditions, although it's essential to consult a medical professional before using any herbal remedies.
